title: Compound Interest Canonical URL Fix Report — Phase 20.7

compound_interest_calculator_404.conclusion: This URL returns 404 and Google has never discovered it. Expected behavior.

compound_interest_canonical.conclusion: THIS is the correct canonical URL. It is in the sitemap and indexed.

sitemap_audit.comparison_page_in_sitemap: /compare/best-compound-interest-calculator (valid comparison page, not the calculator itself)

findings.verdict: The system is correct. /calculators/compound-interest is the canonical and is in the sitemap. /calculators/compound-interest-calculator is a 404 that Google doesn't know about (correct behavior — no redirect needed). All internal links correctly point to /calculators/compound-interest.

action: No fix needed. Update documentation to clarify that compound-interest-calculator is NOT a valid URL.
